visual_base.visual_narrative_log: (1) The scene begins with a woman sleeping in an airplane cabin seat. She is wearing a grey hooded neck pillow that partially covers her eyes. Her hands are resting on a brown blanket covering her lap. Above her head, animated yellow 'Zzz' icons float upwards. (2) Suddenly, the woman’s eyes snap open as she looks upward with a startled but alert expression. She maintains her sitting position while reacting to something off-camera. (3) She reaches up with both hands to adjust the grey hood of her neck pillow, pushing it back to reveal her full face. Her expression is one of eager anticipation and excitement. (4) The woman looks towards the side, presumably interacting with a flight attendant. She is smiling and gesturing slightly with her body. The warm, dim lighting of the airplane cabin creates a cozy atmosphere in the background.
visual_base.text_narrative_log: (1) [Subtitle]: POV:在飛機上秒醒的瞬間. [Slogan]: POV:When I suddenly woke up mid-flight. (2) [Subtitle]: 空服員:要早餐嗎?. (3) [Variety]: 要!. (4) [Subtitle]: 輪到我了嗎?. (5) [Subtitle]: 鮑魚香菇粥還是蔬菜起司蛋?. (6) [Subtitle]: 可以各來一份嗎?. (7) [Variety]: 不行!.

visual_human_presence.countingEvidence: 1 female main character in an airplane seat.
visual_human_presence.mainCharacterDescription: A young woman wearing a light pink long-sleeve shirt and a grey specialized neck pillow with a built-in hood.

visual_scene_and_style.backgroundDescribe: The interior of an airplane cabin, specifically the seating area with an oval window on the left. The cabin has warm ambient lighting.

audio_base.audio_narrative_log: (1) A cheerful, high-tempo electronic synthesizer melody begins. The beat is strong and bouncy, setting a comedic mood. A low background hum of an airplane cabin is just audible underneath. (2) A bright 'Ding' sound effect plays suddenly. A female voice speaks with a very high pitch and excited tone, reacting instantly. (3) A second female voice, acting as a flight attendant, asks a question in a polite but slightly robotic, narrative tone. The first female traveler responds with explosive arousal, shouting 'Ya!'. (4) The first female voice continues to speak rapidly and excitedly, asking for both meal options. The dialogue is punctuated by the steady, upbeat BGM. The second voice responds with a firm, comedic 'No' (不行) at a lower pitch.

narrative_and_purpose.narrativeStructure: Linear: Sleeping -> Waking -> Greedy Request -> Rejection
narrative_and_purpose.mainPurpose: To create a relatable comedic moment about the excitement and greed for free airplane meals, using a 'POV' format to engage the audience's shared travel experiences.

high_inference.freeDescribe: The video uses exaggerated facial expressions and bright on-screen text to enhance the comedic effect of a common travel scenario.
